title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: MITCHELL SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, dental screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 340 SE High Street Mitchell, OR 97750 Hours: Vary by site (541) 763-2725 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 763-2725 Main phone (541) 763-2850 FAX (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD Main phone (541) 763-2725 Mental Health Services (541) 763-2746 FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Wheeler County SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 8am-2pm Mental Health Services: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-6pm Services: Childhood Immunization Dental Hygiene Dental Screening Emergency Dental Care Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MITCHELL SCHOOL SBHC
